query_review: What can you say about OXO products, they're great.  These are easy to use, go in the dishwasher for complete cleaning and are easy to handle.  If they break or if there is an issue, OXO stands behind their products.

retrieved.review: and they work very well. High quality and inexpensive, plus fast shipping. Just add a few tablespoons to a jar filled with salt, and you have your effective, cheap daily shower scrub for dry skin. Also works great on chapped lips and dry hands!

I love OXO products for the quality and durability. These tongs are no exception. Nice soft grip and sturdy locking mechanism. Reasonable price too. I have several sizes of  OXO tongs for different uses and they all have performed perfectly for many years.

We really like this pressure cooker.  It is well made and the perfect size for our family.  We have cooked beans, chicken, beef, and many other items in it and it works great and is high quality.  Shipped fast & well packaged.
